name: Old-Fashioned Filled Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. In another bowl, cream the butter with both sugars until light and fluffy.
4. Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the milk.
5. Gradually mix the dry ingredients into the wet mixture until just combined.
6. Shape the dough into small balls and place them on ungreased baking sheets.
7. Bake for 12-15 minutes or until lightly golden.
8. Allow the cookies to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
